title: ASR Outdoor 16pc Gold Prospecting Equipment Essentials Field Kit
description:
Hit the field with confidence using the ASR Outdoor 16pc Gold Prospecting Equipment Essentials Kit: a field ready gold panning kit designed to cover all the basics for successful gold panning. Whether you're exploring remote creeks, or visiting a favorite claim site, this kit includes durable, reliable gold prospecting equipment to help you classify, pan and recover gold.

Here’s what’s included: 

  • Classifier Screens (Multiple Sizes): Speed up your panning process with lightweight, stackable screens that separate larger rocks and debris from finer material, ideal for high efficiency prospecting

  • Gold Pans: Choose from three different gold pans that give you variety when panning, including a made in USA 11 inch multi wall gold pan, a 12 inch dual riffle gold pan with both deep and shallow riffles, and lastly, a large 14 inch single riffle pan with built in water guide

  • 16lb Black Sand Magnetic Separator: Remove unwanted magnetic black sand from concentrates quickly, this pick up tool is easy to use, quick and efficient, helping you get to the gold faster: Remove unwanted magnetic black sand from concentrates quickly, lightweight and perfect for field use

  • 3-in-1 Shovel: Compact yet rugged, this digging tool is ready to tackle any terrain, whether breaking hard ground, scooping gravel or digging into riverbanks

  • Fine Gold Recovery Tools: Everything you need to help recover and store even the tiniest specs of gold with ease

Perfect for all levels of prospectors, or anyone looking to get their hands dirty in this challenging but rewarding hobby, this gold panning kit has all the essential gold prospecting equipment needed to get you in the game fast. Just add water, dirt and let the gold rush begin. Good luck!
short_description: Classifier Screens (Multiple Sizes): Speed up your panning process with lightweight, stackable screens that separate larger rocks and debris from finer material, ideal for high efficiency prospecting.
